intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant Hecatactis radicans. It's possible that this plant is not widely known or is a misspelling of another plant name.

However, if you are referring to the plant Hecatopterys radicans (also known as Hecatactis radicans), it is a plant species native to South America. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.

The health benefits of Hecatopterys radicans are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins.

The most common herbal preparations made with Hecatopterys radicans include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
